prerequisites: An account with the target web scraping API service that issues an API token.
A valid API token (`api_token`) for that service.

authMethods.name: API token
authMethods.summary: Authenticate by supplying an API token in the `api_token` field. This is the connector's only credential.

setupSteps.title: Obtain an API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the web scraping service that this connector targets and generate an API token from your account.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and configure required fields
setupSteps.body: Enter your API token in the required `api_token` field to authenticate the connector.
